name: ThreeDFlip
shortDescription: Flip sprites with a 3D rotation visual effect (card flip style).

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Flip a Sprite with a 3D effect.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ThreeDFlip

eventsFunctions.name: FlipSecond
eventsFunctions.description: Start a flipping animation on the object. The X origin point must be set at the object center.

eventsFunctions.name: StopFlip
eventsFunctions.description: Jump to the end of the flipping animation.

eventsFunctions.name: IsFlipping
eventsFunctions.description: Checks if a flipping animation is currently playing.

eventsFunctions.name: IsFlipped
eventsFunctions.description: Checks if the object is flipped or will be flipped.

eventsFunctions.name: FlipToSecond
eventsFunctions.description: Flips the object to one specific side. The X origin point must be set at the object center.

description: Flip sprites with a 3D-like rotation effect.
